---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Curriculum vitae of Guan-Fu Chou, PhD student at the University of Michigan's Center for the Study of Higher and Postsecondary Education."
---

[Download CV (PDF)](Chou_GuanFu_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

*Last updated: April 2026*

## Education

**University of Michigan**, Ann Arbor, MI<br>
*Ph.D. Student, Higher Education (CSHPE)*, 2025--Present<br>
*Supervisor:* Dr. Jeremy Wright-Kim

**National Chengchi University**, Taipei, Taiwan<br>
*M.A. in Economics*, 2024<br>
*B.Ed. (Minor in Economics); B.A. in Chinese Literature*, 2021

## Fellowships and Awards

- Education Policy Initiative (EPI) Predoctoral Fellowship, Gerald R. Ford School of Public Policy, University of Michigan, 2026
- Sarri Family Fellowship for Research on Educational Attainment of Youth in Low Income Families, Institute for Social Research, University of Michigan, 2026
- Rackham ISR Summer Training Award, University of Michigan, 2026

## Working Papers

See the [Research](research.qmd) page.

## Affiliations

- Association for Education Finance and Policy (AEFP)
- Association for Public Policy Analysis and Management (APPAM)
